title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS OF THE ROGUE VALLEY BOYS & GIRLS CLUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive and safe place for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, after-school programs, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. 203 SE 9th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Grades K-8 Hours: Monday-Friday 2:30pm-6pm Email (541) 479-5258 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 479-5258 Main phone Main phone (541) 479-5258 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $40 Membership Fee for August 2024-August 2025 $80 per month for 2nd-5th grade $200 per month for K-1 Club (Kinder and 1st Grade) Programs for middle and high school aged students are free. Scholarships available upon request. Additonal fees for team sports and non-school days. Multi-child discount available. Additional fees for team sports and non-school days. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Tutoring Services Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - SUMMER PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
